The Stylist

Meet Abriena

BalayageExtensionsHeadspaColor CorrectionKérastase

Based at Dada Salon in Honolulu, Abriena built her practice on one principle: your hair should work for your life, not against it. As a Kérastase Care Coach and Salon Educator, she pairs technical precision with a real commitment to scalp and hair health.

Every service starts with an honest conversation — your goals, your maintenance reality, and what your hair actually needs. No guesswork. No cookie-cutter results.

What I Offer

Services & Pricing

Most Booked
Dimensional Balayage
Custom lightening placed throughout the hair for soft, natural dimension with a seamless grow-out.

Book this service →
Women's Haircut
Custom cut for your face shape, lifestyle, and hair health. Double cleanse, condition, and style of choice.
$901 hr
Book this service →
Headspa
Full sensory reset. Microscopic scalp diagnosis, Kérastase masque, towel wrap, massage, and heated eye mask.
$1202 hr
Book this service →
Full Color
Complete color change from roots to ends. Perfect for a new look or refreshing grown-out color.
$1502 hr
Book this service →
Extension Install
Full new install or reinstall. New clients require an extension consultation prior to booking.
$3502 hr 30 min
Book this service →
Face Framing Foil
Custom lightening around the entire hairline to brighten and highlight your features.
$1851 hr 45 min
Book this service →
Partial Dimensional Balayage
Custom lightening around the hairline and visual parts of the head. Ideal for refreshing existing color.
$2502 hr
Book this service →
Toner
Adds shine, refines tone, or refreshes existing color. Great between color appointments.
$1201 hr 30 min
Book this service →
Root Touch Up
Covers growth at the roots. Ideal for blending or covering grey or natural root color.
$852 hr
Book this service →
Luxury Blowout
Double cleanse, condition, and style of choice — bouncy blowout, beachy waves, or natural diffuse.
$551 hr

Color Correction

Book Your Appointment

Bookings are handled securely through Square. New to color, corrections, or extensions? Complete the consultation form first.

New to extensions or color correction? Abriena requires a consultation before these services. Complete your new client form → It takes 3 minutes and helps her prepare for your visit.

New Clients

Before Your

Education

Learn From Abriena

Beyond the chair, Abriena teaches at Dada Salon and works as a Kérastase Care Coach — training stylists on scalp health, lived-in color, and the consultation-first approach that builds loyal clients.

✦
Scalp & Hair Health Certification

The Kérastase headspa method — diagnosis, treatment, and retail that retains clients.

✦
Lived-in Color Technique

Dimensional balayage and face-framing that grows out beautifully and books rebookings.

✦
The Consultation-First Model

How to run intake that protects your time, prices correctly, and turns first-timers into regulars.

Teaching a few days a week at Dada Salon · Honolulu

Questions

Frequently Asked

Can't find your answer? The assistant in the corner can help, or send a DM on Instagram.

DM on Instagram →

Color corrections and extension installs require a consultation first. For balayage, toner, or root touch-ups you can book directly. Unsure? Complete the new client form and Abriena follows up before your appointment.

Come with clean, dry hair unless told otherwise. Extension move-ups require clean, dry hair. For color, avoid heavy product buildup. If you filled out the consultation form, she'll send specific prep instructions.

Color corrections and extension installs book out 2–4 weeks. Cuts, blowouts, and standard color are usually 1–2 weeks out. Book early for weekend slots.

Please cancel or reschedule at least 24 hours ahead. Late cancellations and no-shows may incur a fee. Modify your appointment through the Square link in your confirmation text.

The Bang / Neck Trim is complimentary for existing clientele only. New clients are welcome to book a Women's Haircut, which includes a full cut and style.

Abriena is a certified Kérastase Care Coach and primarily uses Kérastase for treatments and retail. Smoothing treatments use the INCA or VARO organic line, chosen for your hair.
